mapper.select: SELECT * FROM exam_request WHERE visit_id = #{visitId} AND status = #{status}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO exam_request (request_no, visit_id, patient_id, item_id, amount, status) VALUES (#{requestNo}, #{visitId}, #{patientId}, #{itemId}, #{amount}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE exam_request SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE exam_request SET status = #{toStatus} WHERE visit_id = #{visitId} AND status = #{fromStatus}
